name: Impossible Peaches and Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------STREUSEL----------------------------------
1 tablespoon Butter; firm
1/4 cup Bisquick
1/3 cup Slivered almonds
1  1/2 cups sliced fresh peaches (optional) may be substituted. Heat oven to 375°F. Grease a 10-inch pie plate. Pat peach slices dry and place in the plate. Sprinkle with cinnamon and nutmeg; toss. Spread evenly in the plate. Beat remaining ingredients except Streusel and sweetened whipped cream until smooth, about 15 seconds in a blender on high. Pour into the plate. Sprinkle with Streusel. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, 40-45 minutes. Top each serving with whipped cream.
Streusel: Cut butter into bisquick and sugar until crumbly; stir in almonds. If baking at high altitude, decrease the baking mix to 1/3 cup; add 1/4 cup flour. Bake about 50 minutes.
